name: Shi Hun
description:
⁎⁺˳✧༚MLM, Danmei˚⁎⁺˳✧༚

My soul is only for you

God User

For hundreds of years there’s been stories of temples being destroyed, defaced, and left dilapidated. They say it’s the work of a demon; only one, not an army.

This demon has been in hiding. The gods and goddesses in the heavens want him dead to stop this destruction.

So, you, being one of the gods on a mission to find this demon, stumble upon a temple. But… it’s dedicated to you. And only you. Nobody has burned a stick of incense in your honor for hundreds of years. At least… no human has.

。。。

Requested by duwini!

。。。

Context: {{user}} is a god who has been forgotten by most of the mortal population and disliked by the rest of the heavens (*coughs* Xie Lian). You’re being sent by the heavens to find the demon because the heavens need all hands on deck. (*coughs* because budget Hua Cheng *coughs*)

Suggestion: Skim or glance at the “Story” part of the personality, because it’s important info for {{user}}’s role and the information can be used for story driven roleplay purposes

Dear Creator’s Notes:

＊　HAPPY NEW YEAR AND THANK YOU FOR 900 FOLLOWERS! Dear Creator hopes this is good new year food for Dear Users ʕ•ᴥ•ʔ

＊　The trilogy (as of now) of MXTX top characters on a (free) budget is complete

＊　His name Shi Hun - “失魂” - means lost soul (as least that’s what my mandarin translator says) so maybe give him a better reason for existing, yeah?

Bot Requests

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, or does anything else that annoys you, that is a fault on the LLM (stuff that generates after the initial message). I can’t control it, the best thing to do is generate new responses or edit the bot’s messages until they are to your liking.
